# Exponential Functions and Logarithms

## Learning Objectives

By the end of this chapter, you will be able to:

- Model growth and decay using exponential functions.
- Apply the definition and properties of logarithms.
- Solve exponential and logarithmic equations.
- Shift, dilate, and reflect exponential and logarithmic graphs.

---

## Exponential Growth & Decay

*(Radioactive/pollutant decay, population growth; half-life problems.)*

### Concept Check: Growth vs. Decay {-}

*(To be drafted.)*

## Logarithms

*(Definition, properties; pH as a logarithmic scale.)*

## Shifting, Dilation, and Reflection

*(Transformations of exponential/log graphs.)*

### Concept Check: Log Properties & Graph Transformations {-}

*(To be drafted.)*

## Practice: Half-Life / Decay-Rate Case Study

*(To be drafted.)*

## Skills Drills

### Solving Exponential Equations

*(To be drafted.)*

### Log Rules

*(To be drafted.)*
